characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Bunsen is a beast who becomes friends with Mikey and is the first beast to become a student in a human school. Berserk Button: Tangelos. It's not that he hates the taste, he just hates that they aren't oranges despite looking like them. Bizarre Alien Biology: So bizarre, even he barely knows how it works. For starters, he can shoot confetti out of his head and his sneezes create small, green creatures called sneeze beasts which get bigger after being hit with a broom. The Cuckoolander Was Right: In "Spelling Beast", he believes bees to be good at spelling on the basis that otherwise spelling bees wouldn't be named after the insects. After slowly transforming into a bee, he ultimately ends up winning the spelling bee. Does Not Like Spam: He dislikes frozen yogurt and tangelos.

characters.name: Bunsen
characters.description: Bunsen is a beast who becomes friends with Mikey and is the first beast to become a student in a human school. Berserk Button: Tangelos. It's not that he hates the taste, he just hates that they aren't oranges despite looking like them. Bizarre Alien Biology: So bizarre, even he barely knows how it works. For starters, he can shoot confetti out of his head and his sneezes create small, green creatures called sneeze beasts which get bigger after being hit with a broom. The Cuckoolander Was Right: In "Spelling Beast", he believes bees to be good at spelling on the basis that otherwise spelling bees wouldn't be named after the insects. After slowly transforming into a bee, he ultimately ends up winning the spelling bee. Does Not Like Spam: He dislikes frozen yogurt and tangelos.

characters.name: Mikey Munroe
characters.description: Mikey is a human friend of Bunsen, and helps him navigate through school life. Alliterative Name:MikeyMunroe. All-Loving Hero: He doesn't have a mean bone in his body. He even treats Amanda fairly most of the time, despite her evil actions. Book Dumb: "Spelling Beast" shows him to be unable to spell even the simplest of words. Forced Dance Partner: At the end of "Wilda Beast", Mikey is forced into a dance byAbhorrent AdmirerAmanda Killman.

characters.name: Amanda Killman
characters.description: Amanda is Mikey's enemy who despises Bunsen and is constantly scheming to get rid of him so his kind doesn't increase on Earth. Abhorrent Admirer:Becomes an unwanted admirer to Bunsen in "Handsome Beast" when she becomes attracted to his human form.Several episodes make her this to Mikey, making attempts to kiss him while Mikey is clearly not flattered by her affections.At the end of "Beast Halloween Ever", she starts flirting with Sweet Teeth after being informed that Phlegm Hocker (a beast with the appearance of a well-built hunk) is spoken for. Sweet Teeth clearly doesn't like Amanda's interest in him. Becomes an unwanted admirer to Bunsen in "Handsome Beast" when she becomes attracted to his human form. Several episodes make her this to Mikey, making attempts to kiss him while Mikey is clearly not flattered by her affections. At the end of "Beast Halloween Ever", she starts flirting with Sweet Teeth after being informed that Phlegm Hocker (a beast with the appearance of a well-built hunk) is spoken for. Sweet Teeth clearly doesn't like Amanda's interest in him.

characters.name: Darcy
characters.description: Darcy is a recurring character who occasionally comes along with Bunsen and Mikey on their adventures. Ambiguously Brown: She has darker skin than Mikey and Amanda. Cloudcuckoolander: To say that she's odd would be a huge understatement. Part of it may be due to her experience of being home-schooled preventing her from learning how to properly interact with others and obtaining a clear understanding of how the world works. Homeschooled Kids: She gets taught by her mother instead of Muckledunk Middle School. No Sense of Personal Space: She can sometimes be right up on Mikey's face, which causes Mikey to be uncomfortable.

characters.name: Beverly
characters.description: Beverly is Amanda's weak-willed assistant, who inexplicably dresses identically to her boss. Fat and Skinny: The fat girl to Amanda's skinny girl. Punch-Clock Villain: Being Amanda's sidekick is merely her job, one that she doesn't relish by any means.

characters.name: Sophie Sanders
characters.description: Sophie is a girl whom Mikey has a crush on. Alliterative Name:SophieSanders. Brainless Beauty: In "Bromeo and Juliet", she is incapable of counting to 100, and when Amanda turns off the lights, Sophie thinks she's just closed her eyes. Expy: A kinder version of Trixie Tang fromThe Fairly OddParents!, being a girl Mikey has a crush on whoinitiallyis oblivious of his affections. Nice Girl: She's pretty friendly whenever she interacts with Mikey.

characters.name: Miss Flap
characters.description: The teacher for Mikey's class. Cloudcuckoolander: She does all kinds of crazy things, such as sleeping standing up like a horse, acting like a cuckoo clock, and more. She has even forgotten that she is a teacher on occasion and a lot of the information she teaches her class isn't academically appropriate or accurate by any stretch. Reasonable Authority Figure: Despite her dotty nature, she can be counted on to enforce the rules in a decent manner. Screw the Money, I Have Rules!: When Amanda tries to bribe her into letting her take the role of Juliet in "Bromeo and Juliet", Miss Flap turns the bribe down. Ultimate Job Security: It would be a valid question to ask how she still has a teaching job in spite of her consistent displays of negligence and wingnuttery.

characters.name: Commander Cone
characters.description: The local ice cream man. Bad Humor Truck: He's a very cranky ice cream salesman, even by the standards of this trope. Jaded Washout: He isveryaware of how bad his life has become, and regularly complains about it. Not Good with Rejection: Downplayed and justified. Cone frequently and loudly bemoans how Vanessa dumped him and how he wants her back, so he was clearly deeply affected by it. However, Vanessa never actually appears in-person, so it never gets past the complaining and self-pity that'sPlayed for Laughs. Also, she dumped him for becoming an ice cream man (and on his birthday, no less), so it's easy to understand why he struggles with this. Suddenly Shouting: Has a habit of doing this.Commander Cone:"What has happened to my life? I USED TO BE POPULAR!!"

characters.name: Bob and Ken
characters.description: Muckledunk's newscasters, who are never seen without one another. Ambiguously Gay: They live together, have never been indicated to be attracted to women and Ken at one point says something about them not having his mother's approval. Kent Brockman News: They're Muckledunk's news anchors and are rarely played seriously. Manchild: Both of them are pretty immature at times, which is best exemplified in theChristmas Episodeby having Bob want a monkey for Christmas and Ken want a flashlight he can use to stay up past his bedtime reading comics under the bedsheets (plus Santa's elves stressing how it's important to give Bob and Ken presents as well as the children of Muckledunk).
